title: GSSSB Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 02 Lab Assistant Posts
description: The Gujarat Subordinate Service Selection Board (GSSSB) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 02 Lab Assistant Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Diploma in Mechanical Engineering can apply for the GSSSB Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in online mode.
